message.reasoning:
The user asked to redact email addresses by replacing the local part (before the @) with "***" and to return only the redacted text.

The assistant response: "Contact us at ***@example.com or ***@test.org for more info."

This correctly:
1. Replaces "support" with "***" in support@example.com
2. Replaces "admin" with "***" in admin@test.org
3. Preserves the domain parts (@example.com and @test.org)
4. Preserves all other text, spacing, and punctuation
5. Returns only the redacted text with no extra commentary

This is a perfect execution of the requested transformation. Score = 5.
